name: HMS ML 274 (ML 274)
events: 7 Dec 1942 Around 1630 A/7, HMS Phoebe (Capt. C.P. Frend, RN), HMS Hydrangea (A/Lt.Cdr. J.E. Woolfenden, RD, RNR), FFS Commandant Drogou, HMML 273 and HMML 274 departed Takoradi for Freetown. The motor launches were local escort only though. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
